# mtncloud_credential (Resource)

Manages an entry in the MTN Cloud credential store. Secret fields are write-only; the API never returns them.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mtncloud_credential" "registry" {
  type     = "username-password"
  name     = "docker-registry"
  username = "ci-bot"
  password = var.registry_password
}

resource "mtncloud_credential" "object_store" {
  type       = "access-key-secret"
  name       = "s3-backups"
  access_key = var.s3_access_key
  secret_key = var.s3_secret_key
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the credential.
- `type` (String) Credential type. One of: `access-key-secret`, `api-key`, `client-id-secret`, `email-private-key`, `tenant-username-keypair`, `username-password`, `username-api-key`, `username-keypair`, `username-password-keypair`. Changing it forces a new credential.

### Optional

- `access_key` (String) Access key (type `access-key-secret`).
- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key (type `api-key` / `username-api-key`).
- `client_id` (String) Client ID (type `client-id-secret`).
- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) Client secret (type `client-id-secret`).
- `description` (String) Description of the credential.
- `email` (String) Email (type `email-private-key`).
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the credential is enabled. Defaults to `true`.
- `key_pair_id` (Number) Key pair ID (keypair-based types).
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Password (username-password* types).
- `secret_key` (String, Sensitive) Secret key (type `access-key-secret`).
- `tenant` (String) Tenant / auth path (type `tenant-username-keypair`).
- `username` (String) Username (username-* and tenant-username-keypair types).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Numeric identifier of the credential.
